description: Back view of a woman with long brown ponytail standing on tan limestone cliff edge, gazing at the expansive deep blue ocean with white-capping waves crashing against rocks below. She wears the same navy blue geometric print dress with black strap, paired with white sneakers. Her right hand holds a black bag strap, left arm relaxed, legs slightly apart in a contemplative pose. The scene features eroded rocky outcrops with small pools, distant horizon of sea under vivid blue sky with minimal clouds, bright sunlight creating sharp shadows and highlighting textures.
location_context: This image appears to be taken at coastal cliffs near Dwejra or Gozo in Malta based on the limestone formations and seascape.
time_context: Mid-morning around 10:10 AM under bright sunny conditions.
